name: Site Backup
description: Create database and file backups from the admin dashboard with retention controls.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Include plugins folder
settings.description: Archive installed plugins with each backup.

settings.label: Retention (days)
settings.description: Delete backups older than this many days.

settings.label: Maximum backups
settings.description: Keep at most this many backup files.

settings.label: Dashboard note
settings.default: Run manual backups before major updates.
settings.description: Short note shown on the dashboard widget.
